sentences.arabic: أَقْرَأُ الْأَخْبَارَ عَلَى الْمَوَاقِعِ الْإِخْبَارِيَّةِ بَدَلًا مِنْ شِرَاءِ الصُّحُفِ الْوَرَقِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Čitam vijesti na informativnim portalima umjesto da kupujem štampane novine.
sentences.translationEn: I read the news on news websites instead of buying paper newspapers.

sentences.arabic: الْأَخْبَارُ الرَّقْمِيَّةُ تَتَحَدَّثُ بِسُرْعَةٍ وَهِيَ مُتَاحَةٌ فِي أَيِّ وَقْتٍ.
sentences.translation: Digitalne vijesti se brzo ažuriraju i dostupne su u bilo koje vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: Digital news is updated quickly and is available at any time.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنْ، يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا التَّأَكُّدُ مِنْ صِحَّةِ الْأَخْبَارِ قَبْلَ نَشْرِهَا.
sentences.translation: Ali, moramo provjeriti tačnost vijesti prije nego što ih podijelimo.
sentences.translationEn: But, we must verify the accuracy of the news before sharing it.
